description: Schema for placeholder provenance tracking. Records where each placeholder value originates from (canonical, standards, knowledge, intake, derived) and enforces forbidden guessing zones.

template_id.description: The template this provenance record applies to.

template_version.description: Version of the template at render time.

run_id.description: Pipeline run that produced this provenance record.

entries.description: Provenance record for each placeholder in the template.

forbidden_zone_violations.description: Any violations of forbidden guessing zones detected during rendering.

coverage.description: Summary coverage statistics for placeholder provenance.

provenance_type.description: Where the placeholder value originates from.

source_field.description: The specific field or path in the source that provided this value.

source_unit_id.description: The unit ID of the source (e.g., a standards ID, KID, or canonical field).

source_library.description: Which library the source belongs to.

resolved.description: Whether the placeholder was successfully resolved.

value_hash.description: Hash of the resolved value for integrity verification.

confidence.description: Confidence score for derived or computed values.

is_forbidden_zone.description: Whether this placeholder falls in a forbidden guessing zone.

derivation_chain.description: Chain of derivation steps if provenance_type is 'derived'.

notes.description: Additional context about this provenance entry.

placeholder_id.description: The placeholder that violated a forbidden zone.

zone_id.description: Identifier of the forbidden guessing zone.

attempted_provenance_type.description: The provenance type that was attempted in the forbidden zone.

required_provenance_type.description: The provenance type that is required for this zone.
